scenarios.name: Credential Stuffing Attack
scenarios.description: Large-scale credential stuffing from compiled breach databases. Similar to the 23andMe incident where 6.9M profiles were exposed.
demo_talking_points: Attackers compiled credentials from 50+ previous breaches
Automated tools tested against Acme Corp login endpoints
15 employees reused passwords from previously breached services

scenarios.name: Targeted Phishing Campaign (APT29)
scenarios.description: Sophisticated phishing campaign impersonating Acme Corp SSO. Employees entered credentials on convincing fake login pages.
demo_talking_points: Fake SSO pages nearly identical to real Acme login
Phishing is the #1 initial access vector in breaches
